title: pelargonium odoratissimum
intro: Pelargonium odoratissimum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
